Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Use logical headings, landmarks, lists, source and date metadata, language, descriptive links, content warnings, and provenance.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Semantic Reading Structure model · Theory Feed T…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Card components communicate enough semantic structure.
